basic_details.job_title: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Bharathiar University (BU) Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 7 July 2026 on the official website https://www.b-u.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BU Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: First class in M.Sc (Physics), Basic knowledge in Quantum Mechanics and Materials Science
qualification.details: First class in M.Sc (Physics) Basic knowledge in Quantum Mechanics and Materials Science

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.b-u.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Bharathiar University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.b-u.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Bharathiar University Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Bharathiar University Project Assistant position is 24 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a First class in M.Sc (Physics) and have basic knowledge in Quantum Mechanics and Materials Science to be eligible for the Project Assistant role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant position in the Bharathiar University recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this Bharathiar University recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Bharathiar University, which is www.b-u.ac.in.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I attach with the application form?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates with your application form.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Project Assistant position is contractual.
